heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5108 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsAnother amended , prior to repeal by , , .section 811 of Pub. L. 103–206section 4107 of this titlePub. L. 106–555, title I, § 122(b)(1)(B)114 Stat. 2766Dec. 21, 2000

Amendments2000— reenacted section catchline without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “To carry out the provisions of this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $3,000,000 for fiscal year 1994, $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1995, and $7,000,000 for fiscal year 1996, and $7,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1997, 1998, 1999, and 2000.”Pub. L. 106–5551996—, which directed amendment of by substituting “1996, and $7,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1997, 1998, 1999, and 2000” for “1996”, was executed to this section to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 104–297, § 404(d)section 810 of Pub. L. 103–206

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To carry out this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2001 through 2005.

children.heading: Cooperative statistics program
children.label: b Cooperative statistics program
children.text: Amounts authorized under subsection (a) may be used by the Secretary to support the Commission’s cooperative statistics program.
